sglang.title: perf: Optimize local attention memory allocation in FlashAttentionBackend
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current implementation allocates maximum sized buffers for local attention metadata during CUDA graph capture, regardless of the actual requirements of the batch being processed. This leads to significant memory overhead and reduced performance.
For instance, with Llama-4-Maverick-17B

sglang.title: docs: Update the MD files
sglang.author: vincentzed
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently, our documentation for supported models includes two separate files: multimodal_language_models.md and vision_language_models.md. This creates unnecessary redundancy and can be confusing for users trying to find information on multimodal capabilities.
The vision_language_models

sglang.title: [router] Add /list_workers endpoint to router
sglang.author: zhuzilin
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In some use case, we may need to send a certain type of request to all workers, e.g. in RL training, we may send /flush_cache or /abort_request to all workers. It will be great to add a /list_workers endpoint to the router, so that we can control workers through the router.
Modifications

sglang.title: Use monotonic clock for interval measurement
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, in most places, SGL measures time interval using wall clock (time.time()), which is not recommended as it does not guarantee monotonicity (e.g., due to NTP sync). More details can be read here: PEP 418.
This is the 2nd PR as mentioned in #6177 .
Modifications
Replaced most time

sglang.title: [fix] illegal memory in _fwd_kernel_ep_scatter_2 and _fwd_kernel_ep_gather
sglang.author: xutizhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

when deploying large scale ep deepseek, the prefill node sometimes meets illegal memory error with heavy workload as following

this is caused by the index overflow in _fwd_kernel_ep_scatter_2.
Modifications

replace int32 index with int64 to avoid overflow.
CUDA_LAUNCH_BLOCKING=1 python

sglang.title: Fix stop_profile does not wait for finishing
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This causes issue in bench_one_batch_sever.py, where the logic is stopping profile and then quiting. Since the original stop_profile is fire-and-forget instead of waiting-for-finishing, the subprocesses gets killed.

vllm.title: Support sequence parallelism combined with pipeline parallelism
vllm.author: cascade812
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
this PR adds support for sp+pp scenario.
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct --tensor-parallel-size 2 --pipeline-parallel-size 2 --distributed-executor-backend mp -O '{"level": 3, "compile_sizes": [4, 8, 16], "splitting_ops": [], "pass_config": {"enable_sequence_parallelism" : true}}'
